response.global_analysis:
1. Spoken Audio Match: No lyrics or vocal music present, but live spoken stage dialogue occurs at the end. Checked and accurately transcribed.
2. Prominent On-Screen Text: Added subtitles for the introductory on-screen messages and announcements from 02:30 onwards to provide context for viewers before the concert begins.
3. Timing & Pacing: Spoken lines by Kiara and Ina have been perfectly synchronized down to the millisecond, with proper splitting to maintain readability and avoid cascading delays.

subtitles.original: The concert will be starting soon.
subtitles.english: The concert will be starting soon.

subtitles.original: Attention For Visitors: Please be aware of flashing lights. Cheering loudly is ok.
